title: taraxacum pinnatifidum
intro: Taraxacum pinnatifidum, also known as the Irish dandelion or prickly dandelion, is a flowering plant species within the dandelion genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve digestive issues such as constipation and indigestion. The plant contains various bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, contributing to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Taraxacum pinnatifidum can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to support digestive health and overall well-being.
